para.nolink: Method Names are highlighted in bold within the Method Titles. Provisionally named Methods (i.e. those not yet added to the Library as they did not qualify at the time they were rung) are marked [P]. Where titles need amending to avoid a conflict with an existing or another amended title, the name has been modified by adding 'II' unless otherwise advised.

section.title: a) Remove Slow Course class (adding Slow to the name if required for uniqueness)

nolink.link: All Saints Nottingham Slow Course Minor

section.title: b) Non-method blocks become methods (moving 'Block' into the name where appropriate)

nolink.link: Seven Stars Differential Little Hybrid Major

section.title: e) Reclassify methods with hunt bell symmetry about a row rather than a change as Treble Place or Alliance

section.title: f) Reclassify methods with stationary bells as Treble Place

para.nolink: Martyrs Link Little Treble Place Major
methods included above where 'Slow' has been added to the name for uniqueness
b) Non-method blocks become methods (moving 'Block' into the name where appropriate)
c) Remove Hybrid and Little Hybrid from method titles (class unchanged)
d1) Remove Differential, Little and Hybrid from short course Hybrid methods
d2) Remove Differential from other short course Hunters
d3) Remove Differential from short course non Hunters (now Principles)
e) Reclassify methods with hunt bell symmetry about a row rather than a change as Treble Place or Alliance
f) Reclassify methods with stationary bells as Treble Place

nolink.emphasis: Total methods to be retitled while retaining their classification

para.nolink: Methods that are currently provisional that will be added under transitional arrangements
